baseline.observed: improve_prompt_inner selected GLM_API_KEY before checking whether the value was blank, so a blank primary key prevented fallback to GLM_API_KEY_2.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because glm_api_key_from_env was missing and the old inline lookup had no blank-value filtering path.

change.summary: Added non-empty environment value selection and routed GLM API key lookup through a helper that ignores blank GLM_API_KEY before trying GLM_API_KEY_2.

verification.result: PASS: Vite build, 30 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No live GLM call was required for API key selection coverage.
Existing GLM_API_KEY priority is preserved when the primary value is non-empty.
Blank primary key values now fail safe to a secondary key or the existing local fallback path.
